inputs.label: Child Gender (0=Boy, 1=Girl)
inputs.businessContext: Select 0 for a boy, 1 for a girl. Used to apply correct formula (+13 cm for boys, -13 cm for girls).

businessContext_i18n.en: Select 0 for a boy, 1 for a girl. Used to apply correct formula (+13 cm for boys, -13 cm for girls).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Erkek için 0, kız için 1 seçin. Doğru formülü uygulamak için kullanılır (erkeklerde +13 cm, kızlarda -13 cm).
businessContext_i18n.de: Wählen Sie 0 für einen Jungen, 1 für ein Mädchen. Wird verwendet, um die korrekte Formel anzuwenden (+13 cm für Jungen, -13 cm für Mädchen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez 0 pour un garçon, 1 pour une fille. Utilisé pour appliquer la formule correcte (+13 cm pour les garçons, -13 cm pour les filles).
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione 0 para niño, 1 para niña. Se utiliza para aplicar la fórmula correcta (+13 cm para niños, -13 cm para niñas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختر 0 للذكر، 1 للأنثى. يُستخدم لتطبيق الصيغة الصحيحة (+13 سم للذكور، -13 سم للإناث).

inputs.label: Father's Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Biological father's adult height in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological father's adult height in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biyolojik babanın santimetre cinsinden yetişkin boyu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße des leiblichen Vaters im Erwachsenenalter in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille adulte du père biologique en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura adulta del padre biológico en centímetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول الأب البيولوجي عند البلوغ بالسنتيمتر.

inputs.label: Mother's Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Biological mother's adult height in centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Biological mother's adult height in centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biyolojik annenin santimetre cinsinden yetişkin boyu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergröße der leiblichen Mutter im Erwachsenenalter in Zentimetern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille adulte de la mère biologique en centimètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura adulta de la madre biológica en centímetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول الأم البيولوجية عند البلوغ بالسنتيمتر.

inputs.label: Child's Current Height (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Optional: current measured height of the child. Not used in prediction formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: current measured height of the child. Not used in prediction formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: çocuğun mevcut ölçülen boyu. Tahmin formülünde kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: aktuell gemessene Größe des Kindes. Wird nicht in der Vorhersageformel verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : taille mesurée actuelle de l'enfant. Non utilisée dans la formule de prédiction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcional: altura medida actual del niño. No se utiliza en la fórmula de predicción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختياري: الطول المقاس الحالي للطفل. لا يُستخدم في صيغة التنبؤ.

inputs.label: Child's Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: Optional: exact age of the child in years. Not used in prediction formula.

businessContext_i18n.en: Optional: exact age of the child in years. Not used in prediction formula.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İsteğe bağlı: çocuğun yıl cinsinden tam yaşı. Tahmin formülünde kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Optional: genaues Alter des Kindes in Jahren. Wird nicht in der Vorhersageformel verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Optionnel : âge exact de l'enfant en années. Non utilisé dans la formule de prédiction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Opcional: edad exacta del niño en años. No se utiliza en la fórmula de predicción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اختياري: العمر الدقيق للطفل بالسنوات. لا يُستخدم في صيغة التنبؤ.

breakdown: Mid-parental height method (Tanner): For boys: (fatherHeight + motherHeight + 13)/2; for girls: (fatherHeight - 13 + motherHeight)/2. This gives an estimate of adult height potential based on parental heights.
Note: The child's current height and age are not part of this formula. Growth plate maturity, nutrition, and health can affect final height. Consult a pediatrician for a personalized prediction.
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
